title: The Sound of Spring on the Breeze

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Leave this big pot to me, Boss! I'll have it
sparkling clean in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text: What?! No way, that's too heavy for you!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Besides, wouldn't you prefer to handle deliveries?
It might even help strengthen those legs of yours!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No, no. You've got it backwards! I'm trying to
build more upper body strength at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
According to my trainer, my lower half has gotten
too strong.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Apparently that's why I lose my balance so easily
when I run. I need to train my upper body more to
restore my equilibrium!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Owner
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That trainer of yours is as earnest as ever, Fu.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Right? That's my trainer for you! No need to hold
back with the lavish praise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Ines Fujin is working the morning shift at
one of her part-time jobs, I plan the afternoon's
training schedule while organizing my materials.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her legs have gotten too powerful, so I should
come up with a routine that targets her core.
Maybe head to the gym and start with five sets of
planks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooshhh!
choice_data_list: The wind outside is pretty strong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking out the window, I see that the cherry
blossoms have bloomed. The seasons slip by so
quickly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, spring has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Grandma. I want to talk to you about
something.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Of course, dear. I expected you'd be here sooner
or later.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Now tell me, Ryan, which path have you chosen
to take?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, you've now achieved three consecutive
victories! It really feels like you've taken your
skills to a whole new level recently!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps one could say that your Mejiro family
caliber has started to shine through! What do you
believe brought this change about?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...My Mejiro caliber?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any of that. I'm just a novice
Umamusume who started her racing career only
recently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
True Mejiro caliber means having unwavering
pride befitting our family's prestige.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's an Umamusume I know who embodies that
essence. I've seen all of her hard work, as well as
the setbacks she's faced along the way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's why I was ashamed of myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ashamed of how I clung to the Mejiro name, even
though I knew I could never become like her.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
I... I see... We'd have never imagined that there
were things you felt ashamed about, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're all very kind. But don't you find it kind of
pathetic? A name isn't something to cling to—it's
a responsibility to bear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If all I do is wallow in self-pity, tellin' myself
things are impossible, then I'll never be able to
stand with my head held high.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's why, when I was watching a certain
someone race, I realized something—I need to
stop getting in my head and just charge ahead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
As long as I keep running with all my might, I'll be
sure to reach new heights. The pride I lack might
just come along naturally.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And then one day, I'll be able to stand tall and
stick out my chest with confidence!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to become more resilient! I might not be
dependable now, but eventually I'll have the
strength I need to bear everyone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm gonna keep reaching for greater
and greater heights—why I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's good, Ryan. Before becoming worthy
of the Mejiro name, you must first focus on
developing as an individual.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text: ...I'm expecting great things from you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Mejiro Ryan has her sights set on the Satsuki
Sho!" That's Ryan for you! Everyone's raving
about her!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: By the way, about today...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin... I get the impression that she's gotten
even stronger since winter.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have ironed out the flaws with her
running technique, and I'd say she's on her way to
being a fan favorite in her next race.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've also somehow grabbed a little of
the spotlight myself...
choice_data_list: It's because the Satsuki Sho is approaching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having performed well in the Asahi Hai F.S., it's
only natural that she'd be expected to make
waves in the first leg of the Classic Triple Crown,
too.
choice_data_list:
It'll be completely different from the Asahi Hai
F.S.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm...
choice_data_list: So make sure you get plenty of rest!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, c'mon, Trainer! You've turned into an even
bigger worrywart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can gripe all she wants, but the image of her
collapsing to the turf after the Asahi Hai F.S. is
forever burned into my memory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's the type to burn up all her fuel in a single
race, then we need to make sure she's always got
a full tank beforehand.
choice_data_list: I want you to enjoy this race to the max!
I want you to enjoy this race to the max!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want her to truly savor this once-in-a-lifetime
race—free of injury and giving it her all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, when it comes to having fun on the
track, Ines Fujin's got everyone beat.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe. "Enjoy the race," huh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It looked like Trainer was already enjoying it
more than anyone! Those sparkling eyes full of
excitement...

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, part-timers! The delivery's here! Let's
get those shelves all stocked up!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what's this? A Classic Triple
Crown-themed boxed lunch! Says eating it will
make you feel like a Triple Crown champion...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the Triple Crown really is just like a
festival.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! So the fastest Umamusume wins the Satsuki
Sho, the luckiest wins the Japanese Derby, and
the strongest wins the Kikuka Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Th-that's right! You really know your stuff!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, it's sorta common knowledge, yeah? So,
like, obviously I'd know.

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
You liar. You only know that because I just told
you a little while ago.

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
You know, Ines, we actually went to watch your
last race. The, um... Asa... something? Asa-high?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes?! You really went
all the way to Hanshin?!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's the one! You were majorly awesome!
Like, seriously!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I'm not paying you all to stand around
chatting! Get a move on!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! Hey, let's continue this later! I want to
properly thank you for supporting me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Zooooom!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Phew... Ines is seriously fast! It's wild...

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Heyyy. So like, during that street interview
before, who'd ya tell 'em was gonna win the
Satsuki Sho?

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Ines, obviously!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: I mean, Ines has totally got what it takes to win on a grand stage, ya know? Or I guess I want her to win, anyway!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Having the chance to see her win something like
that would be crazy motivational. It'd inspire me
to do my best, too!
